reviews.review_title: Best VR asymmetrical Horror game to date
reviews.review_description:
Easily the best asym horror game on VR currently.
Very "Dead by Daylight" esque (without the rage inducing imbalances)

Also brings a cool aesthetic,  unique Killer designs, perks, and unique survivor abilities.

The game is heavily slept on, I would 100% encourage you to try it out (especially with the updated $10 price tag). If you have friends it's even better.

This game is amazing...its just slept on. Nobody online these days. I remember pulling all nighters with this one back in the good old days..the iconic monster voice changer, the environments, the graphics, the overall vibe of this game is nuts. I love every dev that had anything to do with the making of this game. In this case it's us as players that have failed to keep this game alive and that freaking sucks because this is a great late night game to run with some friends for endless fun :( I don't think the dev team has done anything wrong here as far as people complaining about updates..I remember when this came out compared to now and it seems like content has increased a decent amount. I really am heart broken to see this game in this state. I'm gonna have to either find ppl irl with this game or ask around in other games to see who's got this. Because there is no acceptable reason for this game to be dead. Even though the game is dead I still feel like the devs should be very proud of what they created. This game has endless potential we as players just need to pull back together on this one. I do wish for better days in the future with this game. I still rate 5 stars. The devs did a great job

This is dead by daylight vr but devs don’t update anymore sadly and no one plays this amazing game anymore sadly its really fun with friends devs PLEASE update this game has AMAZING potential this might be Goty imo

You read the title right. There are no players on meta or steam that play this game. There is 0 active players mainly because the developers have abandoned this game. Just for context, they haven’t updated this game in nearly 2 years. On their discord they claim they have stopped all their development on INVERSE because it wasn’t generating enough profit. The only good this is that the servers are still up but for not very long. There is also no offline play so when the servers go night night, the game will be fully dead before the end of 2025. Rip INVERSE

I have decided to update my rating. Since the new update has impacted things I liked. And I feel like this rating needs to be changed just to explain a few things that need changing. Or things that are good. 


Positives: 

This game is a 4v1 asymmetrical horror game like Dbd but in Vr. But this surprisingly gives a better objective to do than Dbd.  You repair 3 terminals and once you do that, you get to fight the Nul and also a swarm comes by for extra. Which is fun 

The maps are decent, although not all of them are balanced but I’m sure it can get fixed. 

The gears and items you can use as an agent is great. My two favorite items are the self revive kit and the rader. 

The health bar was finally added to the nul so hooray ^<^

Playing as the nul is fun. And jumpscaring as nul is great! 

They also finally nerfed reaper and buffed kibbler. Love it 👍

The tutorial is great and gives good info, although I would say there is a tiny bug with the nul tutorial, where you smack an agent and flys off into space. But I hope that can be fixed. (Same thing is said again). However I do wish if the Nul tutorial gave out a bit more info on terminals. It would be great if that was the case. Like for example the tutorial doesn’t state that there are 5 terminals in total around the map. So I hope that’s clarified. 

Also having to play by yourself with AI is also great, to test out abilities or items. Or if you’re in a public match and if there’s not enough players, the spaces will fill in with AI agents or a Nul. So pretty great. 

The price now is actually 10 dollars. Which is very cheap but hey. More players the merrier. 

I would say overall it’s fun to play both sides 

Negatives: 

There’s are negatives I would give. 

Endless extermination is not fun. Not in the slightest. Even for both sides. It’s not fun. I don’t like the idea of having a nul camp out the entire game or agents hiding the whole game. It’s very frustrating and it makes the game longer than it should. So please fix that. Or try to rework it in some way. 

There’s still no new nuls, maps, or items yet. 
They have added a new redesign to the stun ball and the new holo shield. And new perks for the agents. But I do wish there is new perks for the nul. It would honestly make the game get going again if there was new things. But I know there will be an update coming soon from you MassVR. So I do count on you 
👍

The most biggest gripe I have right now. Is the new perk medicine man. Please nerf it. It’s too strong. 
I suggest having it where using a heal or boost syringe heals you one health state. but also gives you the boost at the same time. Because it heals you instantly back to full. And it’s very annoying. But I know this hopefully will be fixed. 

The perk short circuit needs to be buffed. I rarely see anyone use short circuit and I wish it had some more spot light. A suggestion I would give is make it where more skill checks appear. And each time you successfully land skill checks, they will appear often. rather than having the skill checks go faster. That way, it’s a good option. 

Improve the AI agents and also the nul. They are way too easy to counter. And AI agents are very confused on where to go. Same for AI nul. So please fix that. They just need adjusting so they are at a reasonable level. 

Mass Vr 

Because of the update and how everything has turned out. You get 4 stars for now. 
It was originally 4.5 but because of endless extermination. It’s just now lower. 
Not to a very bad level. But I know you guys can do better ^^ this rating isn’t very scary but it could keep going down if none of the negatives are deal with. 
I will still support this game. Because I love it still. But I hope you guys release something that will be good. Overall it’s good but just please do something with endless extermination. It’s not great. And also other negatives. 
I wish you good luck on your game still ^^

This game deserves WAY more attention since it is a really great Dead by Daylight sort of multiplayer game, but for VR so it is SO much more fun!

Devs are still updating it recently adding some nice graphics and gun reloading. 

I like that the Null and agents are pretty balanced so nobody feels too overpowered.

It TO good, I love the design for the Nuls and the Swarm update scared the living hell out of me, they just give me the creeps. also I am glad you change the shield grenade so the stun and shield don’t get confused from each other. I can’t wait till the next update

The adrenaline you feel when running from a nul is intense playing nul and charging at people is fun. Can be very spooky at times. I think everyone should atleast try the free trial. Insanely fun more will most likely come to the game. You should get this game NOW!!1!!1!

My only complaints is how hard it can be to escape the null without a stun bomb and the lack of nul skills maybe summoning skills and climbing skills could be added also the nul gets no item. Maybe he could get a special skill after getting a down. But this is beta and more stuff will most likely come

🚨FULL VIDEO REVIEW AVAILABLE ON YOUTUBE BY SEARCHING ‘GAMERTAGVR’

WHEN I FIRST LAID EYES ON INVERSE I ASSUMED IT WAS AN OFFICIAL STRANGER THINGS VR GAME. THE LOGO FONT & THE SCIENTISTS RUNNING FROM WHAT LOOKS TO BE A FLOATING DEMIGORGON CONVINCED ME IT WAS, BUT IT ACTUALLY ISN'T, BUT IF IT WAS IT WOULD BE THE BEST USE IF THE TV SHOW LICENSE AND ILL DO MY BEST TO EXPLAIN WHY IN TODAYS REVIEW OF INVERSE. I WAS A HUGE  FAN OF FEAD BY DAYLIGHT AND THIS DEFINITELY DELIVERS THOSE VIBES AND BECUSSE YOUR IN VR BEINF HUNTED DOWN BY A MONSTER I ACTUALLY FIND THIS EVEN MORE SCARY, STRESSFUL AND LOTS OF FUN.

developer_response.body: Hey Spinny! Thanks so much for checking out INVERSE! We’re sorry you're having trouble getting into multiplayer at the moment. The UI did change a bit between Early Access and the full release, so I think you may just be overlooking where you join multiplayer. There is no longer an option to join multiplayer using the menu; instead you have to utilize the in-game console opposite the TV where the tutorial videos play. You should see 4 options: Quick Match which puts you into the first open slot within a lobby, Enter Lobby Code which allows you to enter a known lobby code to join a particular lobby, Host Private Lobby which opens up a fresh lobby for just you and whomever you want to join you, and Friends which brings up your Meta friend list and allows you to join friends who are currently in lobbies, if there is space available. It's also good to check your wifi connection as well, just in case it's lagging at all. Finally, if you're still having issues joining multiplayer, the best way to reach the Dev team to help with troubleshooting is by joining the INVERSE Discord. You can also chat with other players and the Dev team about the game in general and coordinate playing with others. You can do that here: https://discord.gg/rFwfkJXHmJ

developer_response.body: Hey TRexH101! Thanks so much for checking out INVERSE! Thank you for the feedback. The Agent AI are pretty limited in what they have to work with, which is why the trap seems so prevalent for them. As you improve in your movement as either of the Nul, you may find that you're able to avoid them more easily. The traps also affect the new Skitter Swarm as well, so that can help eliminate any extraneous traps once you reach Extermination Phase. We are always looking at ways to improve the AI, though, so we're definitely taking your notes to heart. If you have any more details or thoughts on anything for us to improve, the best way to let the Dev team know is through the INVERSE Discord server! You can also chat with other players and the Dev team about the game and coordinate playing with others. Check it out here: https://discord.gg/rFwfkJXHmJ

reviews.review_description:
Game is mislabeled as "comfortable", but unfortunately it only offers snap vs smooth turn and slowing down your walking speed (which is counter-intuitive in a predator /prey genre). There are no teleport, vignette, or even third person options (ie Hellblade). If you don't have VR legs, skip this.

That being said, I did try to play for a bit. It seemed fun but quickly gave me a headache after a few attempts. The training was fun and there seem to be many ways to engage. I did not like that there was a shop that seemed to ask for real money for silly upgrades (maybe it was game money but I'm sure others will clarify). The graphics are ok but not high quality. The complexity is not too bad.  It's definitely a Dead by Daylight FPS in VR as others have said. 

If you like this survival genre, but like me, prefer motion options, try Cosmodread, or the excellent arcade-type shooter Crashland. Cosmodread is a roguelike where you may die a lot but get better each time as you find free upgrades. It takes place on a spaceship that changes every play through. Crashland can feel a little repetitive, but you will want to keep coming back because it is so challenging and there are so many ways to play. 

I am going to assume the misleading labeling is not the developers fault and not penalize my rating. Three and a half stars for the game and interesting concept and another half star for the genre. We need more games like this with flexible play options. Unfortunately I will be seeking a refund.

developer_response.body: Hey Ydura! Thanks so much for checking out INVERSE! We’re sorry you didn’t enjoy your experience with the game so far. Unfortunately, some of the comfort options you mention, such as teleportation for movement, are not as actionable in multiplayer games because they could very easily lead to cheating. We can definitely look into adding some visual comfort options, however. Also to clarify, the in-game store is for cosmetics, not anything gameplay related. All perks and loadout items are unlocked through level up.

reviews.review_description: Awesome game,really gets the blood pumping an puts you in panic mode,gets real tactical too,look forward to future updates an content,for something different to play definitely pick it up,it's a lot of fun,and gets better the more you rank up,it's awesome

reviews.review_title: Stranger things meets dead by daylight
reviews.review_description:
I only played two matches and I’m already in love with it.

Only one small thing that does bother me are the hands,the grab animations for when we climb ladders are a little broken,it looks like I’m grabbing it with my wrist instead of my hand.

This game has quickly become one of my favorite VR experiences.  My favorite aspects of the game include:

- Thrilling atmosphere
- The quality of the audio is one of the best in VR.  
- Console level graphics that is refreshing after so much cartoonist mobile looking VR games
- The co-op modes are fun and even random players in this game play the objective well
- Cool custom skin patterns
- Interesting gadgets and progression system

Overall I highly recommend this game!

developer_response.body: Hey Trippadoodle! Thanks so much for checking out INVERSE! Thank you for the feedback. Without additional information, it sounds like your cloud backup for the game may have been corrupted. All you have to do is go to https://secure.oculus.com/my/cloud-backup/ and scroll down to INVERSE and delete the cloud backup. You will not lose your level or other multiplayer related progress, but you will have to recomplete the tutorials and challenge maps you've already completed. Also, if you do encounter any other issues, the best way to let the Dev team know is through the INVERSE Discord server! You can also chat with other players and the Dev team about the game and coordinate playing with others. This is incredibly helpful if you have any additional information about what you're experiencing, as well. Check it out here: https://discord.gg/rFwfkJXHmJ

reviews.review_description:
Ok. You got two awesome things. Stranger things vibes, and an awesome Dead By Daylight VR feel. The community is so nice and fun to play with (Not Toxic AT ALL.) The teamwork and game physics are just *MWAH* 😗🤌 Plus the amazing graphics?! This game just hits so amazingly different, I want to play it all the time. Also it is actually scary at moments, for those who think some alien ain’t scary, This will make your soul leave your body. Anyway dev’s, you guys are like my favorite people rn. I WILL DEFINITELY MAKE A YOUTUBE VIDEO ON THIS FOR MY CHANNEL. 🤩🤯

100/100 can’t wait to see future updates, monster skins, and other cool stuff you guys at to the game!
